magic-syrup.name: Magic Syrup
instructions: Combine sugar, buttermilk, and butter in a large saucepan over medium heat; cook and stir until melted and smooth, about 4 minutes. Stir in vanilla extract. Add baking soda and stir until syrup is frothy and doubles or triples in volume, about 1 minute.

make-melted-cheese-sandwich-in-an-air-fr.name: Make Melted Cheese Sandwich In An Air Fryer
make-melted-cheese-sandwich-in-an-air-fr.original_name: Haz sándwich de queso fundido en airfryer
instructions: Preheat air frying at 180 ° C
Toma las rebanadas de pan y una con mantequilla cada una de las caras.
Then you're gonna put together the sandwich with two slice of bread and a slice of Filling Cheese.
When ready, get them to the air fryer for 3 minutes till the cheese gets fraked and the bread gets crisped.
After that time, you'll have a good, crispy and creamy Fold Cheese Sandwich.

make-ahead-blt-waffle-sandwiches.name: Make-ahead Blt Waffle Sandwiches
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C. Arrange bacon on a broiler pan and bake until crisp, about 15 minutes. Remove the bacon and reduce the oven temperature to 93°C.
Preheat a waffle iron to high.

In a large bowl, whisk the flours, baking powder, kosher salt, and few grinds of black pepper. In a medium bowl, whisk the milk, 1/3 cup melted butter, and egg. Add the milk mixture to the flour mixture and stir just to combine. Stir in the cheese and herbs.

Brush the waffle iron with melted butter and spoon in about 1/2 of the batter. Close and cook until the waffle is browned and crisp. Transfer the waffle to a plate and keep warm in the oven. Make another waffle with the remaining batter. Quarter the two waffles, creating 8 smaller waffles.
Mix Dijon mustard and maple syrup. Set aside.
To make a sandwich: top a waffle with the bacon, lettuce, and tomato. Drizzle on some maple-mustard sauce. Add another waffle to top.

make-ahead-chilled-mulled-wine-punch.name: Make-ahead Chilled Mulled Wine Punch

ingredients.prep: such as Traditional Medicinals Organic Hibiscus Tea

ingredients.item: Orange or other seasonal citrus such as blood orange or clementine

instructions: In a small saucepan, combine ½ cup maple syrup and ¼ cup orange marmalade over medium heat, whisking until marmalade has loosened. Add two 3" cinnamon sticks, 3 whole cloves, 1 whole star anise, and 1 green cardamom pod, crushed, and cook over low heat for 15 minutes, stirring frequently and watching carefully so it doesn’t boil. Remove from heat and infuse for 30 minutes. (You can make the cold-brewed hibiscus tea while you wait.)

Add ¼ tsp. vanilla extract. Strain syrup through a fine-mesh strainer.
Do ahead: Spiced maple syrup can be made up to 2 weeks ahead; cover and chill.

In a resealable container, such as a 16-oz. mason jar or a large measuring cup if using immediately, combine two 100% hibiscus tea bags with 1½ cups plus 1 Tbsp. room-temperature filtered water. Let sit for 15 minutes. Remove tea bags, pressing to expel liquid.
Do ahead: Cold-brewed hibiscus tea can be made up to 24 hours ahead; cover and chill.

Stir together one 750-ml bottle dry red wine, 1½ cups Cold-Brewed Hibiscus Tea, 5 oz. Grand Marnier, and 3 oz. Spiced Maple Syrup in a large punch bowl, salad bowl, or pasta pot. (If making in advance, use a 48-oz. or larger pitcher; transfer to bowl before adding ice.)

When ready to serve, add about 2 cups ice. Float 1 lemon, cut into wheels and 1 orange, cut into wheels in the bowl. Sprinkle with freshly grated nutmeg just before serving.
Do ahead: Punch (without ice or citrus wheels) can be mixed 24 hours ahead; cover and chill.

mango-and-coconut-sorbet-lezzet.name: Mango And Coconut Sorbet

ingredients.item: 2 pcs mango (brushed 1 ball ready vanilla ice cream)
1 small bowl grated coconut walnut Home

instructions: 1. Transfer your cube chopped mangoyu into the kitchen robot.
2. Add cream, yogurt and vanilla ice cream and become pure.
3. Pour the mixture from a coarse resistant to ice.
4. Last modified Add coconut and mix again.
5.  Buzlukta en az 6 saat kadar dondurun.
6. Cut the prepared sorbeyi to 2 You can also serve by putting into coconut.

maple-sriracha-sauce.name: Maple Sriracha Sauce
instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Add maple syrup, sriracha, and soy sauce; whisk together until blended. Simmer until flavors combine, about 10 minutes.

maple-walnut-scones.name: Maple Walnut Scones
instructions: Set oven rack to lower center of oven. Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Toast walnuts on a baking sheet in the oven for 3 to 5 minutes. Cool.

Whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl. Toss butter pieces in flour mixture to coat. Use a pastry blender to cut in butter until mixture resembles fine crumbs. Stir in toasted walnuts. Beat egg in a large bowl. Mix in half-and-half, maple extract, and vanilla extract. Stir dry ingredients into wet ingredients, mixing until just blended, switching from a spoon to your hands as mixture comes together. Place dough in the refrigerator for 10 minutes.
Roll chilled dough into a ball on a lightly floured surface. Flatten dough into a 3/4-inch circle. Cut into 8 wedges.
Bake scones on a parchment lined baking sheet just until firm and the bottoms are lightly browned, 15 to 20 minutes. Cool for 3 minutes before transferring to cooling racks.
Stir together confectioners' sugar, hot water, and remaining maple extract. Drizzle on scones to glaze.

maple-cinnamon-toast-with-citrus-and-cre.name: Maple-cinnamon Toast With Citrus And Crème Fraîche
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Place orange slices and sugar in a small bowl. Scrape in vanilla seeds; save pod for another use. Toss to coat orange slices.

Mix butter, cinnamon, a pinch of salt, and 2 Tbsp. maple syrup in a medium bowl to combine. Spread cinnamon butter on one side of each piece of brioche. Place on a rimmed baking sheet and toast in oven until brioche is golden brown (the bottoms should be very crisp), 8–10 minutes.
Place each toast, buttered side down, on plates. Top with crème fraîche and orange slices. Drizzle remaining 1 cup maple syrup over toasts and finish with a sprinkle of salt.

marialva-style-tuna-gratin-teleculinaria.name: Marialva Style Tuna Gratin
instructions: Peel and cut the potatoes in 1.5 cm slices. He cooks them in salt-tempered water, and they do not break.
Unte um tabuleiro com parte da maionese e espalhe no fundo as batatas. Reserve.
Misture numa tigela os alhos bem picados com um pouco de salsa picada, as azeitonas, igualmente picadas ou cortadas em rodelas, os ovos grosseiramente cortados e o atum escorrido.

Spread the previous mixture over the potatoes and cover with the remaining mayonnaise. Decorate with the morrine pepper cut into strips. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180 degrees, until gratin. Serve hot.

marshmallow-sauce.name: Marshmallow Sauce
instructions: Using an electric mixer, beat egg white until soft peaks begin to form. Lower speed; slowly add 2 Tbsp. water, then corn syrup. Increase speed; beat until creamy white in color and doubled in volume, 5–6 minutes.
Beat in sifted sugar and vanilla extract.

massaman-chicken.name: Massaman Chicken

ingredients.prep: such as nam pla or nuoc nam
fried shallots, and cooked rice (for serving)

instructions: Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high heat. Season chicken with salt and cook in batches, skin side down, until golden brown (do not turn), 8–10 minutes; transfer to a plate.

Cook potatoes in same pot, turning occasionally, until brown, 8–10 minutes; transfer to another plate. Cook onions in pot, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, 5–8 minutes; transfer to plate with potatoes.

Add curry paste to pot and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 4 minutes. Add beer. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until reduced by half, 5–7 minutes. Add chicken, coconut milk, and broth. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until chicken is very tender, 1–1½ hours.

Return potatoes and onions to pot and cook until potatoes are soft, about 30 minutes. Remove from heat and mix in fish sauce, lime juice, palm sugar, and chile powder; season with salt and pepper. Top with cilantro and shallots. Serve with rice.
DO AHEAD: Chicken can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

matcha-milk-tea-iced-matcha-latte-for-su.name: Matcha Milk Tea (+ Iced Matcha Latte For Summer)
matcha-milk-tea-iced-matcha-latte-for-su.original_name: Té matcha con leche (+ Iced Matcha Latte para verano)

ingredients.item: 1 cucharadita de polvo de matcha de alta calidad
1 taza de leche (puedes usar leche de vaca, almendra, soja, avena, etc.)

instructions: Put the teaspoon of matcha into a small bowl.
Add the two tablespoons of hot water and mix with either a bamboo beaker (chasan) or a small electric beaker until a soft and crisp dough forms.

Warm up his milk in a saucer with medium heat till hot but not boiling. Swallow hot milk into a cup. Add matcha and sweetens to taste. It's a good mix. If you prefer, you can add a frosted milk with a scuba top. Your matcha and milk tea's ready to enjoy. Can sprinkle some additional matcha at the top as decoration.

matcha-berry-frozen-yogurt.name: Matcha-berry Frozen Yogurt
instructions: Purée one 5.3-oz. container plain whole-milk Greek yogurt (reserve container), 1¼ cups frozen strawberries and/or raspberries (about 6 oz.), 2 Tbsp. heavy cream (if using), 2 Tbsp. sugar, and pinch of kosher salt in a blender, pushing down with a tamper or rubber spatula as needed (doing this will help the mixture blend well without getting soupy), until smooth but still quite firm (you want it to be the consistency of a very thick milkshake).

Scrape yogurt mixture back into reserved yogurt container or another freezer-safe
container. Cover and freeze until firm to the touch, at least 30 minutes and up to 2 hours
(don’t go any longer or mixture will becomes too icy).

Just before serving, microwave 2 Tbsp. coarsely chopped white chocolate and 1 tsp. coconut oil in a small microwave-safe bowl until melted, about 45 seconds. Add ½ tsp. matcha and whisk until smooth; let cool (about 5 minutes).

Transfer frozen yogurt to a serving dish if desired and pour white chocolate
mixture over. Let sit until a firm shell forms before eating.

meat-and-leek-dish-lezzet.name: Meat And Leek Dish
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a saucepan and add meats for 5 minutes.
2. K&uuml onion;p in shape.

5. Sauce vegetables with meat up to 5 minutes and add peppers with vegetable juice.

7. Add beans and cook for 15 minutes.

meat-pie-with-mashed-potatoes-teleculina.name: Meat Pie With Mashed Potatoes
meat-pie-with-mashed-potatoes-teleculina.original_name: Empadão de carne com puré de batata

ingredients.item: 800 g de carne de vaca para estufar
1 small can of tomato in pieces
Sal e pimenta ou piripiri q.b.

instructions: To prepare this meat pie, peel and wash the onion and garlic teeth and finely pick them. Take a pressure cooker to the fire with the olive oil, let it heat up, add the onion, garlic, the laurel leaf and the branch of parsley or coriander and let it saute until the onion becomes soft. Add tomato, meat cut into pieces, white wine and 4 dl of water, rectify the spices, close and let boil for 40 minutes.

Take it out of the fire, let the steam out, open it, remove the meat, let it quench and shred it very finely. Pass the broth of the pan through the net handle, lay in a pan what was left in the pusher, add 3 dl of broth and the pre-dissolved masena flour in a little water and bring it back to the fire, stirring until it thickens. Remove from the fire, correct the seasonings, add the meat, mix well and book.

Make the puree: wash the potatoes, cut them in half, cook them with the skin in water seasoned with salt, drain them, let them love and remove their skin. Then pass them through the pass, add the butter and warm milk, season with nutmeg, salt and pepper and mix well.

Lay a little of the puree on a dish of dishes, spread over the meat, cover with the remaining puree, smooth, brush with the yolk mixed with the milk and have some sausage slices. Take to the oven in the grill function until it gets very hot and golden and serve decorated to taste and accompanied with salad.

meat-puff-pie-teleculinaria.name: Meat Puff Pie
instructions: Peel and pinch the onion and garlic teeth. Put them in a pot with the olive oil and bacon, cut into cubes, and let it shine. Add the minced meat and stir until it's very loose.
Once thawed, squeeze the spinach well with your hands. Add them to the sauté, as well as the mushrooms. Season with salt and pepper, mix well and let cook.
Start the oven at 180 degrees. Line a tart 25 cm in diameter with one of the masses (keeping the vegetable paper underneath). Pinch the bottom with a fork and fill with the meat preparation.
Cover with the other dough, press the edge with a fork (to eliminate excess), brush with beaten egg and sprinkle with sesame seeds. Take it in the oven for 25 to 30 minutes. Remove and serve hot.

meatloaf-cupcakes.name: Meatloaf ‘cupcakes’
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (180°C).
In a bowl, mix together the meatloaf ingredients.
Line a muffin tin with cupcake liners.
Fill the muffin liners with the meatloaf mixture and pat down to form a dome.
Bake meatloaf cupcakes for 25-30 minutes or until cooked through.
In a saucepan over medium heat, add the potatoes, water to cover the potatoes, and salt.
Bring potatoes to a boil, then reduce the heat and cover.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until potatoes are fork-tender.
Drain the water and add in the butter and milk.
Mash the potatoes with a fork until smooth.
Fill a ziplock bag with the mashed potatoes.
Pipe the potatoes onto each meatloaf cupcake to resemble frosting.
Sprinkle with parsley.
Enjoy!

mexican-style-black-bean-and-corn-salad.name: Mexican-style Black Bean And Corn Salad

ingredients.prep: pitted, and cut into small cubes

instructions: Mix together black beans, avocados, corn, red bell pepper, picante sauce, cilantro, onion, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and cumin in a large bowl until well combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate until salad is chilled, at least 1 hour.

meyer-lemon-and-blueberry-cheese-tart.name: Meyer Lemon And Blueberry Cheese Tart

ingredients.prep: such as Trader Joe's® Meyer Lemon Cookies

instructions: Thoroughly mix crushed lemon cookies and butter together in a bowl.
Press cookie mixture into the bottom of an 8-inch springform pan.
Place blueberries and sugar in a saucepan over medium-low heat; simmer until sugar has dissolved and a thin sauce forms, 10 minutes.
Stir cornstarch into blueberry sauce; simmer until sauce has thickened, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat and cool for 10 minutes.
Stir mascarpone, lemon curd, and whipped topping together in a bowl until well blended and smooth.
Spread mascarpone mixture over the crust in the springform pan. Cover with waxed paper and freeze until semi-firm, about 10 minutes.
Spread blueberry sauce over mascarpone layer; cover with waxed paper and refrigerate until set, at least 1 hour.

microwave-poached-eggs.name: Microwave Poached Eggs

ingredients.prep: such as rice vinegar, white wine vinegar, or apple cider vinegar

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume

instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'In a small microwave-safe bowl, whisk water, rice vinegar, and salt until well-combined.'}
{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'Place bowl in microwave and heat water at 100% power in 1 minute intervals until 98 to 100°C, about 4 minutes total.'}
{'step': '3', 'instruction': 'Using oven mitts or a kitchen towel, carefully remove bowl from microwave and gently slip the egg into water.'}
{'step': '4', 'instruction': 'Return bowl to microwave and cook at 80% power until the whites are fully set but yolks are still soft, about 1 minute and 20 seconds.'}
{'step': '5', 'instruction': 'While eggs are cooking, place a paper towel on a plate; set aside.'}
{'step': '6', 'instruction': 'Using a slotted spoon, carefully lift egg from bowl, allowing any excess liquid to drip back into the bowl.'}
{'step': '7', 'instruction': 'Transfer to paper-towel lined plate and, using a paring knife or scissors, trim whites if desired.'}
{'step': '8', 'instruction': 'Serve immediately.'}

mint-julep.name: Mint Julep
instructions: In each of 4 short glasses, place 8 mint leaves and 1 teaspoon powdered sugar. Muddle, crushing mint to release oils. Add 1/2 cup (generous) crushed ice to each glass, then 1/4 cup bourbon, and 1 tablespoon water. Stir to blend, adding more powdered sugar if desired. Top each glass with several small sprigs of fresh mint.

miso-almond-butter-cookies.name: Miso-almond Butter Cookies
instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Whisk flour and baking soda in a medium bowl.

Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat, swirling occasionally, until it foams, then browns, 5–6 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl and let cool 5 minutes. Add brown sugar and stir until well combined, about 1 minute. Add egg and continue to stir until mixture is smooth, about 1 minute longer. Add almond butter, miso, and vanilla and stir until well combined. Mix in dry ingredients, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until combined. *If you aren’t feeling the chocolate dip (instructions below), now is the time to stir in ½ cup chocolate chips. Let dough rest 10 minutes.

Scoop 2-tablespoonfuls of dough and roll into a ball (you should have 16 balls). Arrange on 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 2" apart. Make a crosshatch pattern with a fork across tops of dough (if fork sticks to dough, dip into water before continuing). Bake cookies, rotating sheets halfway through, until lightly browned and firm around the edges, 12–14 minutes. Let cool.

Melt chocolate in a microwave in 20-second blasts, stirring in between, until completely smooth. Dip 1 side of each cookie into chocolate and return to baking sheets. Let sit at room temperature until chocolate hardens, about 2 hours. Sprinkle with sea salt.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be made 2 days ahead. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.

miso-glazed-carrots-with-scallion-gremol.name: Miso-glazed Carrots With Scallion Gremolata

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: peeled, halved lengthwise, cut into 3"-long pieces on a deep diagonal, halved on a deep diagonal if particularly short

instructions: Mix 1 bunch scallions, finely chopped, 2 garlic cloves, finely chopped, zest of 1 lemon, 1 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds, 1 tsp. unseasoned rice vinegar, and ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl; season with more salt if needed. Set scallion gremolata aside.

Bring 1 cup pure maple syrup, ¾ cup (1½ sticks) unsalted butter, ½ cup white miso, ¼ cup low-sodium soy sauce, remaining ⅓ cup unseasoned rice vinegar, and 2 cups water to a boil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high heat, whisking occasionally. Add 3 lb. small carrots, peeled, halved lengthwise, cut into 3"-long pieces on a deep diagonal, halved on a deep diagonal if particularly short, and reduce heat to medium. Cover and cook 12 minutes (set a timer to be exact; carrots should be about halfway cooked at this point.)

Uncover pot, increase heat to high, and cook, stirring often, until carrots are fork-tender and glaze is thick and glossy (like the consistency of a warm gravy), 13–16 minutes. Remove pot from heat and stir in lemon juice.

Using a slotted spoon, transfer carrots to a platter. Pour any glaze left in pot into a small bowl. Top carrots with reserved scallion gremolata and serve with glaze.
Do Ahead: Carrots can be cooked 1 day ahead. Transfer to an airtight container and chill. When ready to reheat, just add a splash of water to the glaze to thin it out slightly.

mixed-berry-oatmeal-crisps.name: Mixed-berry Oatmeal Crisps
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C. Toss frozen berries and cornstarch in large bowl. Let stand until cornstarch dissolves, tossing occasionally, about 20 minutes. Divide berry mixture among six 4 1/2-inch-diameter crème brûlée dishes with 1-inch-high sides. Toss brown sugar, flour, oats, nuts, cinnamon, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in large bowl. Add chilled butter; using fingertips, blend butter into mixture until coarse crumbs form. Divide oat mixture among dishes, sprinkling evenly over berry mixture.

Place dishes on rimmed baking sheet. Bake 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C and continue baking until crisp topping is golden brown and fruit filling is bubbling at edges, about 30 minutes longer. Cool crisps at least 15 minutes. Serve warm or at room temperature topped with scoop of vanilla ice cream.

molasses-halva-lezzet.name: Molasses Halva
instructions: 1. melt the butter in a thick-based pot.
2. Add olive oil and flour and roast until the color changes.
3. Add walnuts and roast a few minutes.
4. Add water, molasses, vanilla and sugar in a bowl, and stir quickly.
5. Cook for 5 minutes and leave to scratch by taking the stove.
6. Straighten parts from the mixture and straighten on the countertop and cut with the flower-shaped cookie mold to the service plate.
7. Pour nuts to the middle.
8. What are the Pinpoints of the Chemez Helva? To not keep the bottom of the chest, constantly mix the opposite directions with the wooden spoon.
9. The use of margarine in Helva is often done wrongs.
10. It is necessary to use butter to blend the halva with its own smell.
11. 11. If the consistency is soft, you can add the azar azar.
12. Mix the materials of the mixture of molasses until they miss each other.
12. August 1 How many calorie of the Porsion Notice? A portion of the molasses prepared with standard materials is about 290 calories.

molded-caramel-ice-cream-teleculinaria.name: Molded Caramel Ice Cream
instructions: Beat the cream in whipped cream very firmly, then add the condensed milk and continue to beat until the preparation is very smooth and homogeneous.
Line the interior in a form, like English cake, with vegetable paper, leaving the edge slightly higher than the shape, and pour in it the previous preparation, up to half.
Sprinkle with cookies, roughly broken, reserving some for decoration and then add the caramel topping, also booking a little to decorate.

Sprinkle with crushed hazelnut kernel, cover with the remaining cream and take it to the freezer until solidify (for about 3 hours). Remove, deform and decorate with the remaining topping, crushed cookie and whole hazelnut kernel.

moroccan-chicken-tagine.name: Moroccan Chicken Tagine
instructions: To make the spice mix: Mix cinnamon, cumin, turmeric, coriander, ginger, mint, salt, and pepper together in a bowl. Measure out 1/2 cup spice mix and set remaining mix aside for another use.
To make the tagine: Bring a small pot of water to a boil. Add apricots and raisins and cook until soft, about 5 minutes. Drain, reserving 1/2 cup cooking water.
Place chicken and 1/2 cup reserved spice mix into a bowl; toss until thoroughly coated.

Pour enough olive oil into a large skillet or Dutch oven to coat the bottom; turn heat to medium. Cook chicken in the hot skillet until golden brown and it releases easily from the skillet, 3 to 4 minutes per side. Add onion and garlic; cook and stir until fragrant, 2 to 3 minutes.
Add apricots, raisins, and reserved 1/2 cup cooking water; stir in chicken broth and honey. Cover, reduce the heat to low, and cook until chicken is very tender, 1 ½ to 2 hours.
Serve chicken garnished with cilantro and almonds.

moroccan-spiced-pastitsio-with-lamb-and-.name: Moroccan-spiced Pastitsio With Lamb And Feta
instructions: Heat oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion softens, about 5 minutes. Add lamb; cook until brown, breaking into small pieces, about 8 minutes. Stir in tomatoes with juice, mint, ras-el-hanout, tomato paste, 21/2 teaspoons cumin, and cinnamon. Bring to boil. Reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer until lamb mixture is thick, stirring often, 15 to 18 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.

Meanwhile, bring 2 cups milk to simmer in medium saucepan. Remove from heat; cover to keep warm. Melt 6 tablespoons butter in heavy large saucepan over medium heat. Add flour; whisk until smooth. Reduce heat to medium-low; cook until roux is pale golden, whisking often, 3 to 4 minutes. Gradually add warm milk to roux, whisking until sauce is smooth. Whisk 1 cup milk and 3 egg yolks in medium bowl; whisk into sauce. Whisk in feta and 1/2 teaspoon cumin. Bring sauce to boil, whisking often. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer until slightly thickened, mashing with potato masher to break up cheese, about 5 minutes. Season sauce with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill. Rewarm over low heat, whisking often, before using.

Preheat oven to 204°C. Butter deep 14-cup baking dish. Cook pasta in large pot of boiling salted water until tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally. Drain pasta; return to same pot. Mix 2 tablespoons butter into pasta. Add egg whites and 1/4 cup Parmesan; stir to blend.

Spread 4 cups pasta in dish. Spread lamb mixture over. Top with remaining pasta. Spoon sauce over; sprinkle with 1/4 cup Parmesan. Place dish on rimmed baking sheet. Bake pastitsio until heated through, about 40 minutes. Let stand 5 to 10 minutes.

instructions: Clean the fresh mushrooms and cut them into thin slices.
Add the dried wild mushrooms into a small bowl, cover them with some warm broth and let them soak for 5 minutes.
Heat in a pot a little olive oil and add the butter to melt and give the flavors.
Sauté the onion and leek for 5-6 minutes, to caramelize.
Keep some fresh mushrooms for the garnishing of the dishes and sauté the rest for 3-4 minutes.
Drain with the wild mushrooms, add them to the pot along with the garlic and sauce for 1 minute.
Add the warm broth, some nutmeg, salt and freshly ground pepper. After boiling, lower the heat and boil the mushroom soup for 15 minutes without lid.
Finally, add the cream and boil for 4-5 minutes.
Place the soup with rhableder and check the salt and pepper.
Divide it into bowls or deep dishes by adding to each portion with a thin toasted slice of bagetta, 1 tablespoon of cream cheese, finely chopped chives and a little cheese.
If you want, garnish with fresh soute mushrooms and serve.
